mdRecord.dcterms:title: War Time Correspondence to Capt. C. M. Stigleman at Manassas Junction from I. H. Slusher at Culpepper CH
mdRecord.dcterms:description: War time correspondence, July 27, 1861, to Capt. C. M. Stigleman at Manassas Junction from I. H. Slusher at Culpepper CH, Va. Subject: Slusher’s working at the hospital. 1 original piece.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Soldiers
United States
Correspondence
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
